---
title: "A Little About Me"
---

Thanks for coming by! I'm a Bay Area native currently studying Applied Mathematics and Data Science at UC Berkeley.

I enjoy computing (hardware/systems architecture and web development), automotive/motorsport engineering (I'm a Vehicle Dynamics engineer for Berkeley Formula Racing), working out (on a push/pull/legs split), hooping, and EDM (I was a top 350 Spotify listener of William Black worldwide in 2025). I'm also pretty proud of my general knowledge base, which I'm constantly adding to.
